title: Marinated American Peanuts Stir-fry
description: This quick and easy peanut dish is perfect for a weeknight meal featuring a savory marinade that adds flavor to the peanuts before stir-frying.
instructions: Combine peanuts, salt, soy sauce, brown sugar, red pepper flakes, and garlic powder in a large bowl. Mix well to ensure all peanuts are coated evenly.

In a small pot or pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat until shimmering hot but not smoking. Pour the peanut mixture into the heated oil and stir continuously for about 3-4 minutes or until the peanuts are crispy and golden brown.
Remove from heat immediately after stirring to prevent burning. Let cool slightly before serving as a snack.
